headline: 1 Profitable Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Avoid
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

raw.headline: 1 Profitable Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Avoid
raw.summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

headline: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) Passes Quality Screen With Flying Colors
summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) is a top AI chip software leader with an 86% gross margin, 65.84% ROIC, and 12% revenue growth, passing strict quality screens for long-term investors.

raw.headline: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) Passes Quality Screen With Flying Colors

headline: Cadence Design Systems: The Software Version Of An AI Bottleneck
summary: Cadence is one of the few AI infrastructure plays that hasn't been properly re-rated to reflect the tailwinds ahead. Read why CDNS stock is a Buy.
